hub.releaseNotes: macOS focus fix, auth state buffering.

freecell.releaseNotes: Auto-updater fix release. The per-game auto-update path is now functional end-to-end for the first time - every previous update installer shipped with a broken app-update.yml that pointed at the source repo instead of the release repo. This release fixes the build config so all future update installers carry the correct config. Also adds a Restart Now button to the update notification: when an update is downloaded, the bell notification shows two options - Restart Now to apply immediately, or Later to keep playing and have the update install silently when you next quit the game. Diagnostic logging for the auto-updater now lands in game-state.log so future failures are visible.

minesweeper.releaseNotes: Auto-updater fix release. The per-game auto-update path is now functional end-to-end for the first time. Adds the missing update notification modal that Minesweeper was lacking, with a new Restart Now / Later UX. Bell notification on update available; clicking the bell shows the modal with two options. Restart Now applies the update immediately; Later keeps playing and installs silently on next quit. Diagnostic logging for the auto-updater is now visible in game-state.log.
